_about: Prop asset set registry (Premium Props Preparation Pack 0.7). 'basic' = the bundled CC0 Kenney GLBs (currently at public/models/props/*.glb, NOT moved into a basic/ subfolder so scene.json paths keep working). 'premium' = upgraded models the user supplies later (null = slot declared but no asset provided yet; the loader falls back to a placeholder box at runtime). Reading this manifest AT RUNTIME is intentionally NOT implemented in 0.7 (this phase is preparation only) — scene.json still drives prop loading. NOTE (0.8): runtime per-slot model swapping now exists via the SEPARATE props.variants.json registry (desk/chair/laptop alternatives under variants/, selectable in the app panel); this manifest remains the basic/premium set ledger only. Validate this file with: npm run check:props. Record every asset's license in ASSET_CREDITS.md.
